title: Manufacturability
description: MP-owned domain taxonomies filled into Noetica's Verdict envelope (Law 15; package §3.5). Both enums are CLOSED and frozen (spec §5.3): member change = MAJOR. Outcome/error split: MANUFACTURABLE, NOT_MANUFACTURABLE, PLAN_INVALID are grounded outcomes (episode written); INFRA_ERROR is the only error (no episode).
